methods.name: add_inputs_and_targets
methods.desc: Add Inputs & Targets to Box Storage, Take in an MBR Payment and Refund Excess if there is any

methods.name: prime_training
methods.desc: Reset Weight & Bias and set the intended epochs and learning rate for new training phase

methods.name: predict
methods.desc: Use our trained weight and bias into a f(x) for equation of a line to predict a target y for some value of x
